reviews.comment:
En la semana que no había nafta por ningún lado ellos me salvaron. Había muy poca espera cuando en otros lados era imposible. La atención correcta.

(Translated by Google)
During the week when there was no gas anywhere, they saved me. The wait was very short, when it was impossible elsewhere. The service was excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGM2FicHZBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Atención muy lenta, solo 1 persona trabajando y muchos autos para alguien que está solo y encima trabaja a su tiempo. Estuve 20 minutos esperando para cargar combustible y había 4 autos delante mio. Lamentable

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service, only one person working, and too many cars for someone who's alone and on top of that, working on time. I waited 20 minutes to get gas, and there were four cars in front of me. Disappointing.
